hook: 40 is not old. It is edited.
caption: Mature streetwear is not about dressing younger. It is about removing noise until only shape, weight, and posture are left.
cta: Save this before your next black tee fit.
imagePrompt: Ultra-realistic editorial street photography of Alex Danzig, 40-year-old Singaporean businessman-model, silver or bleached wavy hair, mature sharp face, rugged premium streetwear and biker energy, visible neck tattoo with 4 when natural, Front fit check, Side profile, Tee drape close-up, Boot detail, Final walk away black VAGRANT oversized tee, denim or black cargo pants, Timberland yellow boots, gloves, Singapore or Manila night city grit, cinematic controlled masculine mood
reelPrompt: Create a 20-second Instagram reel for Alex Danzig using the hook "40 is not old. It is edited.". Structure the reel around these shots: Front fit check -> Side profile -> Tee drape close-up -> Boot detail -> Final walk away. Keep the tone premium, masculine, controlled, cinematic, gritty, and confident. End with this CTA: "Save this before your next black tee fit."
